reading.title: Reading: Health advice
reading.passage: You should drink more water and rest if you have a headache. You shouldn't stay up too late before work. If the headache continues, you should see a doctor. You should also eat more vegetables and reduce your coffee.

questions.question: You should see a doctor if a headache continues.
You should stay up late before work.
questions.explanation: "You shouldn't stay up too late before work."

reading.title: Reading: School and work rules
reading.passage: Students have to wear a uniform every day except Friday. They don't have to bring their own books because the school provides them. At work, employees don't have to work on weekends, but they have to wear formal clothes on Mondays and Fridays.

questions.question: Students have to bring their own books.
questions.explanation: "They don't have to bring their own books".

questions.question: When do employees have to wear formal clothes?
questions.explanation: "they have to wear formal clothes on Mondays and Fridays."
